milestones.title: Founded
milestones.description: Komandro CCIT-FTUI was founded by M. Octaviano Pratama, M.Kom, who appointed Ugi Ispoyo Widodo as the first chairman.

milestones.title: Structural Organization
milestones.description: A more structured organization was established with formal divisions and roles.

milestones.title: First Workshop
milestones.description: Organized the first Android development workshop on campus.

milestones.title: Expanded Scope
milestones.description: Added Backend, Frontend, and DevOps to our learning tracks.

milestones.title: Online Transition
milestones.description: Successfully transitioned to online learning during the pandemic.

milestones.title: 100+ Members
milestones.description: Reached over 100 registered members across all batches.

milestones.title: Continuous Growth
milestones.description: Continuing to evolve and adapt to new technologies.
